title: salix yezoalpina f. neoreticulata
intro: Salix yezoalpina f. neoreticulata, also known as the Yezo willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which are attributed to the presence of salicin and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Salix yezoalpina f. neoreticulata include relief from pain and fever, as well as its potential use in treating conditions such as arthritis and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
